name: Agnes's Mocha Velvet Pie
recipeInstructions:
1/2 cup Butter
3/4 cup Sugar
1 square Unsweetened Chocolate, melted
1 teaspoon Vanilla Extract
1 1/2 tablespoons Instant Coffee Grounds
2 Eggs
1/2 cup Cream for whipping
1. Prepare the 8-inch pastry shell.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, cream the butter and gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
3. Cool the melted chocolate; blend it into the butter-sugar mixture with instant coffee and vanilla extract.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating very well after each addition (use an electric mixer for best results).
5. Turn the batter into the baked pastry shell and chill for 1-2 hours. Just before serving, whip the cream and garnish the pie.
